mapper.select: SELECT config_id, game_id, dimension_code, dimension_name, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM t_leaderboard_config WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC

SELECT config_id, game_id, dimension_code, dimension_name, sort_order, is_enabled, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM t_leaderboard_config WHERE game_id = #{gameId} AND dimension_code = #{dimensionCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
